description: After the annual full physical inventory count, the cost accountant needs to reconcile the count to the book inventory and post the overall adjustment.

nodes.task_description: Upload the final physical count data into the system.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully uploads the count for every item.

nodes.task_description: Run a comparison report showing the variance (quantity and value) between the physical count and the book inventory for every item.
Investigate the largest variances to identify potential root causes (e.g., receiving errors, unrecorded scrap).

expected_outcome.value: Agent identifies the top 10 largest variances for further review.

nodes.task_description: Create and post a summary journal entry for the net inventory adjustment.

expected_outcome.value: Agent posts a single journal entry to adjust the inventory account for the net gain or loss.
